description: Thread Guy interviews Luca Netz in Venice, California, discussing business strategies and the challenges of frequent travel for meetings. They explore the differences between in-person and virtual meetings, emphasizing productivity and energy levels.
topic_summary: Luca Netz shares insights on building a business, the importance of in-person interactions, and managing time effectively while traveling for work. [t=0:32] [t=5:04] [t=64:47]
